title: Iridium ModPack
description: The Ultimate Modpack For Vanilla Style Minecraft
body:
**The Iridium Modpack** offers a fresh take on the original Minecraft experience. It keeps the core gameplay, exploration, and creativity that fans know and love. But under the hood, Iridium makes a variety of tweaks to improve performance (making use of mods such as sodium, lithium, and more). This means you can explore sprawling landscapes, build ambitious projects, and battle zombies and skeletons – all without worrying about lag or slowdowns interrupting your adventure.
Iridium also offers a range of visual improvements such as shaders better animations connected textures and more!!!
______________________________________________________________________________________________
